title: PMX
description: PMX is a modpack for Minecraft, created for comfortable play on Macronux and Pickme servers, as well as for singleplayer, with individual modpacks for each server.
body:
## Description of the PMX assembly:

✨ PMX is a specially developed assembly of modifications (mod pack) for Minecraft, focused on comfortable play on servers such as Macronux and PickMe. It includes a set of carefully selected mods that improve the gameplay, add new features and optimize performance. A special feature of the assembly is the presence of mod packs created individually for each of the specified servers. This ensures that the assembly will work correctly and allow you to enjoy the gameplay without any problems.

## 🤔 Why do you need this assembly?

### ✅ The EMX assembly will be useful if you:

- 🎮 Play or plan to play on Macronux or PickMe servers. It provides a ready-made environment with pre-installed mods that are necessary for comfortable play on these servers, including modifications created specifically for them.

- ⚙️ Looking for a ready-made solution for playing Minecraft with mods.  You don't have to waste time searching, installing and configuring individual mods. EMX provides everything in one package.

- 🚀 Want to improve the performance and graphics quality in Minecraft. The assembly includes mods that optimize the gameplay, which is especially important when playing on servers with a large number of players.

- 🌍 Want to be able to play both on servers and in single-player mode. The assembly allows you to enjoy mods both on servers and in single-player mode.
